text:
The order book matches orders between counterparties on the exchange. Orders are commonly matched by price first, then by time of entry, though the exact matching rules are Novig's to confirm.

If two people place limit orders at the same price and time, a human on our ops team can walk you through how that specific scenario resolves. If you have a particular order you'd like us to review, share the order ID and we can look at what happened.

Novig Support
